title: Accounts Executive (SAP) #ez
description:
Your new company

Client is a business center dealing with trade of minerals and metals. Seeking to hire a Business Process Control Executive (Accounting) - (12- months).


Location: CBD

Work hours: Mondays to Fridays, office hours

Role: 12 months contract

Salary: up to $3,800 per month


Your new role

This role focuses on operational accounting activities, executing SAP accounting workflows accurately and efficiently in accordance with internal guidelines to ensure the timely processing of sales and purchase entries, payment transactions, and vendor/customer bank registrations, while maintaining strong compliance with internal control standards.


The incumbent is also expected to support the department's initiatives in digital transformation and continuous process improvement.


1. Process SAP accounting workflows in accordance with Business Process control guidelines such as verifying supporting documents, such as sales and purchase delivery notes, contracts, invoice etc.

2. Execute month-end and quarter-end closing activities, including accurate entries for sales, purchases, and non-operating items, by applying the Closing Process Checklist to ensure completeness.

3. Provide clarification for third-party or cross-border payments when required

4. Continuously review workflow efficiency and maintain accuracy without compromising key controls.


What you'll need to succeed

· Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field.

· Good with SAP workflow knowledge and familiarity with accounting function

· Proficient in handling accounting documentation and transactional verification

· Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Familiarity with digital tools such as Power Automate, Power Query, and SharePoint is also desirable.

· Basic understanding of financial reporting processes


What you'll get in return
This is an exciting opportunity to join an MNC. You will be part of a dynamic team and you will be remunerated at market competitive rates.

What you need to do now
If you're interested in this role, click 'apply now' to forward an up-to-date copy of your CV, or call Ernie at Hays on +65 6424 0157 or email Ernieza.Zailani@hays.com.sg for a confidential discussion.


Referrals are welcome.
